title: Immunity for Trump, surprises on abortion: Supreme Court takeaways
shortDescription: The Supreme Court's decisions this term affect the presidential election, federal enforcement of environmental rules, gun control and more.

title: Nice-guy Tim Scott as Trump VP? South Carolinians doubt it
shortDescription: Tim Scott's MAGA transformation has those who know him back home wondering if Trump wants a cheerleader or a hitman for his vice president.

title: Biden slams Trump for Project 2025 connections
shortDescription: President Joe Biden said former President Donald Trump is lying about knowing 'nothing' about Project 2025 and said it will 'destroy America.'

title: Meghan McCain calls out 'cult worship' of Trump and Biden
shortDescription: Meghan McCain likened Biden defenders to Trump supporters following the fallout from the first presidential debate June 27.

title: 5 House Democrats called for Biden to step aside. What we know.
shortDescription: Five House Democrats have called for President Joe Biden to make way for another Democratic nominee. What we know about them.

title: 'Dangerously out of touch': Democrats weigh in on Biden's ABC interview
shortDescription: Some Democrats praised the president for his first post-debate television interview, but others are joining calls for him to exit the 2024 race.

title: Rep. Angie Craig urges Biden to drop out, joining 4 other Dem lawmakers
shortDescription: U.S. Rep. Angie Craig, D-Minn., joined calls for President Joe Biden to end his reelection campaign Saturday.

title: 'Still in good shape' Joe Biden bargains with America to stay in race
shortDescription: From cognitive tests to calls to The Almighty: questions about Joe Biden's future remain after primetime interview.

title: Nate Silver calls for Joe Biden to step aside after ABC interview
shortDescription: Political pollster Nate Silver said President Joe Biden should transition the presidency to Vice President Kamala Harris "within 30-60 days."

title: Follow the money: Who are the top donors to Biden, Trump and RFK?
shortDescription: We are tracking presidential election fundraising for Joe Biden, Donald Trump, and Robert F. Kennedy Jr. This story will be updated with new filings.

title: Reformist candidate wins Iran's presidential election. What it means.
shortDescription: Masoud Pezeshkian, who campaigned on limited, closer ties with the West, and some reforms to strict moral codes, won Iran's presidential vote.

title: Biden digs in: 6 takeaways from high-stakes primetime ABC interview
shortDescription: President Joe Biden, in a primetime ABC interview, said he won't drop out of the 2024 election, downplaying his disastrous debate as a "bad night."

title: Biden says only 'the Lord Almighty' could convince him to drop out
shortDescription: President Joe Biden said he was "exhausted" during the first 2024 debate but he alone was responsible for his poor performance.

title: Biden claims race is 'toss-up' in ABC interview, what do polls say?
shortDescription: Biden dismisses reports of low approval ratings in an ABC News interview Friday: "I don’t believe that’s my approval rating."

title: Biden defends himself in ABC interview; refuses need for cognitive test
shortDescription: In his first TV interview since debate, Biden points to his job and campaign as proof of his abilities, saying, "I have a cognitive test every day."

title: 'Vile act of hate': Illinois congressman's Capitol Hill office vandalized
shortDescription: U.S. Rep Brad Schneider said his Capitol Hill office was vandalized on July 4th, days after demonstrations outside his Chicago home.

title: President Biden on cognitive testing
shortDescription: President Biden says he faces cognitive tests every day as America's leader in an exclusive interview with ABC News's George Stephanopoulos.

title: In released ABC interview clip, Biden blames cold, "really bad night" for debate
shortDescription: “Well, I just had a bad night,” Biden says in ABC news interview, explaining his debate performance.

title: Biden answers questions about debate criticism
shortDescription: President Joe Biden responds to criticism of his debate performance in an exclusive interview with ABC News anchor George Stephanopoulos.

title: Warner organizing Senate Democrats to ask Biden to leave race: reports
shortDescription: The move would could mark a significant shift in the behind-the-scenes effort to convince Biden to step aside.

title: Michael Flynn debunks Trump VP claim | Fact check
shortDescription: The form has been digitally altered to include Flynn's name. Trump hasn't picked a running mate as of July 5.

title: 'They're trying to push me out,' Biden tells voters
shortDescription: President Joe Biden called out fellow Democrats pushing for him to exit the 2024 election. "Some folks don't seem to care who you vote for," he said.

title: Biden assures voters that he will stay in the presidential race
shortDescription: President Joe Biden made a crucial stop in Madison, Wisconsin, and assured voters that he will continue to stay in the race.

title: Biden gives rare TV interview. Here's how many he has given
shortDescription: From the serious to the silly, we look at the televised interviews President Joe Biden has given since he won the White House.

title: Massachusetts governor calls for Biden to consider dropping out of race
shortDescription: Gov. Maura Healey is the first Democratic governor to signal publicly that Democrats might be better off if Joe Biden withdraws from the race.
